response.justification: Candidate has roughly 6 months of professional C++ experience at National Instruments (2014-2015) plus an academic C++ project, far short of the 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ required. The bulk of the career is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web, GIS, and AdTech domains. There is no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking, and no demonstrated work with SQL Server or Oracle on Windows platforms. The profile does not meet the mandatory technical or domain requirements.
strengths: ~16 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
Some low-level/performance background via DLang microservices and embedded work
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, over a decade ago, with no recent C++ work
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure
No SQL Server or Oracle experience and no evidence of Windows-platform development

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
